full_text:
Sima Biao (Shaotong) 司馬彪 (紹統)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Biao (司馬彪), styledShaotong (紹統). A historian, he previously led a lustful life before disownment made him change. Sima Biao was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Sima Biao lived during the Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
